siteErrors.errorBody: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page or return home.

nav.userAreaDesc: Sign in to manage finances and customers.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Choose Google or enter email and password
login.errorInvalid: Invalid email or password — or no password set yet.

loginOs.heroBody: Google sign-in unlocks your workspace, documents, clients, projects, and the org AI assistant.
loginOs.bulletLocale: Interface in Hebrew, English, or Russian with RTL/LTR
loginOs.authBody: Use the Google account approved for your organization. After sign-in you go straight to the workspace.

help.email: Use your Google email — login will use the same address
help.orgName: This will appear on invoices and documents. Can be changed later.

construction.lead: BSD-YBM is built for construction and allied trades. Pick your trade to align AI scanning and documents.
construction.hint: You can change this anytime in organization settings.

success.title: Application Submitted!
success.desc: We received your request — admin will approve within 24 hours.
success.descTeam: You joined effectively. You can now sign in.

forecast.title: Cash Flow Forecast (AI)
forecast.subtitle: Integrated CRM + ERP
forecast.hint: Forecast uses weighted probability based on CRM pipeline stages.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDesc: Overrides device language for this browser.
settings.saveHint: Cloud settings save from the panel buttons.
settings.prefsSavedLocal: Preferences saved in this browser on this device.
settings.cloudSaveCTA: Use the panel buttons to save cloud settings
settings.inviteOk: User {email} was assigned to your organisation.
settings.tradeAdaptHint: Changing your construction trade updates issuance templates, UI wording, AI analysis modes and scanner headers immediately — in your selected language (Hebrew / English / Russian).
settings.tradeSaveRefreshHint: After saving, refresh the page to see the change across all workspaces.

scanner.title: Multi-Engine AI Scanner
scanner.subtitle: PDF, Office, Images, CSV, JSON, XML. Choose an AI provider in the AI Hub.
scanner.drop: Drag files here or click to select
scanner.dropDark: Drag files here, or click to browse
scanner.tip1: Upload clean PDF files for maximum accuracy.
scanner.tip2: Choose multiple engines for results comparison.
scanner.chatPlaceholder: Write a message to the AI...
scanner.chatWelcome: Talk naturally with AI about your company data and reports.
scanner.noEnginesDesc: Please configure API keys in the settings area.
scanner.acceptHint: PDF, Office, images, CSV, JSON, XML, HTML, Markdown, RTF
scanner.chatInvalid: No valid AI request to run.

aiHub.title: AI & Scanning Hub
aiHub.subtitle: Smart scanning, data extraction, and document writing assistant.

cookie.title: Cookies
cookie.body: We use cookies for essential functionality and analytics. By continuing you agree.
cookie.wallBody: We use essential cookies for the site and sign-in. You may also allow analytics and marketing — your choice.

language.label: Language
language.hint: Auto-detected from your device; you can change anytime.

layout.trialBannerOne: You have 1 day left in your free trial.
layout.trialBannerMany: You have {days} days left in your free trial.
layout.trialSuffix: to keep full access to all tools.

erpPage.title: Expense documents & ERP
erpPage.subtitle: AI scans, supplier tracking and price benchmarks — organised for your company.
erpPage.geminiBody: Missing Gemini key on the server. Set
erpPage.geminiCode: in .env.local and Vercel (Environment Variables), then restart the server.
erpPage.searchHint: Search results for: "{q}" ({count}) · total expenses in view: ₪{total}
erpPage.statAvgTrend: Based on total expenses in current view

landing.heroTitle: One OS for construction — documents, cash, projects, field
landing.heroKicker: CRM · ERP · AI — construction & allied trades
landing.heroSubtitle: For contractors, developers and allied trades: CRM, ERP, AI scanning and team workflows — one stack, tuned to the trade you choose.
landing.pricingHeadline: Plans for office and field — scale as you grow
landing.footerTagline: BSD-YBM | Construction · allied trades · CRM · ERP · AI
landing.featureCrmDesc: Clients, suppliers and subs — quotes, orders and a clear line to the site.
landing.featureInvDesc: Invoices, expenses and cash flow tuned for sites and back office.
landing.featureFlowDesc: Document understanding with construction context and your selected trade.
landing.featuresGridTitle: Advanced tools to run your projects
landing.featuresGridSubtitle: Documents, cash, customers and field — in one professional stack.
landing.featureOpsDesc: Attendance, sites and crews — office and field connected.
landing.featureIntelDesc: Trends and signals — on top of data you already collect.
landing.featurePortalDesc: Controlled sharing and tracking with end customers.
landing.readyCtaTitle: Ready to upgrade your project management?
landing.tutorialIntro: Animated guides to CRM, ERP and the AI scan hub. Replace with your own MP4 files in /public/tutorials/ if you prefer.
landing.tutorial1Body: See how leads, contacts and quotes stay organised in one place — ready for follow-up and closing.
landing.tutorial2Body: Scan supplier invoices, track expenses and issued documents so your numbers stay accurate.
landing.tutorial3Body: Upload files, pick an AI engine and run OCR — structured data flows straight into ERP.

marketingDrawer.brandQuote: We organise the past, we build the future

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.body: BSD-YBM is the product of over 20 years running offices, accounting and piles of paperwork. Yohanan Bukshpan distilled two decades of operational know-how into a smart AI system that turns office chaos into a precise management avenue.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: We would love to hear from you — details below or quick WhatsApp.

executive.title: Organisational snapshot
executive.subtitle: Global cash flow, user activity and price alerts across all organisations.
executive.incomeHint: Sum of totals from all issued documents (non-cancelled), all organisations.
executive.expenseHint: Sum of AI-extracted totals on ERP documents across all organisations.
executive.noLogins: No sign-in records yet — they update after the next login.
executive.priceAlertsSub: Top 5 sharpest price increases (ERP, whole system)
executive.noSpikes: Not enough price observations to compare, or no sharp increases.

executiveCharts.title: Annual cash flow {year}
executiveCharts.subtitle: Revenue vs ERP expenses (by month, all organisations)

aiBubble.initialGreeting: Hello! I’m the avenue between your operations and AI. How can I help?
aiBubble.errorGeneric: Couldn’t get a reply. Try again shortly.
aiBubble.errorNetwork: Network error — check your connection and try again.
aiBubble.title: BSD-YBM AI

erpDash.pageSubtitle: Organisational cash-flow summary — revenue vs expenses, managed inventory and supplier price alerts
erpDash.netFlowIntro: Net flow (issued revenue minus scanned document expenses):
erpDash.scannerDesc: Upload a supplier invoice — BSD-YBM analyses prices and records observations for supplier comparison.
erpDash.priceAlertBody: {count} line(s) from AI scan have no unit price or line total. Enter pricing in your ERP workflow to clear this flag.
erpDash.priceAlertBannerCta: Tap to enter prices and clear alerts
erpDash.priceAlertModalHint: Enter a unit price (ex-VAT) per row. Line totals are calculated from quantity when present.
erpDash.priceAlertModalTruncated: Showing {shown} of {total} rows — save to load the next batch from the banner.
erpDash.priceAlertValidate: Enter a positive unit price for every row.

notebook.title: Project notebook (NotebookLM-style)
notebook.subtitle: Upload multiple project PDFs and ask questions about engineering requirements, specs, drawings, and quantities. Answers are grounded in your files.
notebook.modelHint: Uses Gemini (default: gemini-1.5-pro). Override with GEMINI_NOTEBOOK_MODEL in the server environment.
notebook.emptyChat: Add PDFs on the right, then ask about reinforcement, concrete grades, standards, or any requirement in the documents.
notebook.placeholder: e.g. What concrete strength is specified for the foundations? List rebar diameters from the drawings.
notebook.footerHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
notebook.limitsHint: Limits: 8 PDFs, 6MB each, ~18MB total per request. Large specs may need to be split.
notebook.noGemini: Gemini API key is not configured on the server (GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY or GEMINI_API_KEY).
notebook.readError: Could not read one of the files.
notebook.confirmClearOnFiles: Changing sources starts a new session. Clear the current chat?

priceCompare.title: Price tracking: {name}
priceCompare.subtitle: Comparison of recent ERP purchases
priceCompare.insightBody: Unit gap between the last two purchases: ₪{diff}. Compare alternative suppliers or consolidate orders for volume discounts.

intelligencePage.title: Intelligence
intelligencePage.subtitle: Modules by role ({role}) — edit the map in lib/intelligence-access.ts

home.title: A workspace that's a bit smarter
home.description: BSD-YBM brings order to your documents and data. Simple interface, helpful AI, that's it — everything you need.

crm.title: CRM & Clients
crm.desc: Manage clients, quotes, and contracts in one clear page.

invoice.title: Invoices & ERP
invoice.desc: Generate documents and cash flow reports with order and clarity.

help.title: Help & Documentation
help.desc: Quick answers to questions and real-world working examples.

pt1.title: Clean, bright interface
pt1.desc: Simple design that doesn't distract — only what you need, when you need it.

pt2.title: Smart AI that helps
pt2.desc: Automatic data extraction from images and text with no surprises.

pt3.title: Languages & auto-detect
pt3.desc: The system detects your language when you sign in and switches everything for you.

marketing3D.heroDesc: BSD-YBM redefines the boundaries of business capability. A unified operating system integrating ERP, CRM, and autonomous AI for a powerful, clean, and elite management experience.
marketing3D.solutionsTitle: The Avenue. The Flow. The Result.
marketing3D.fieldOpsDesc: Total synchronization between the site and headquarters. Manage service calls, inventory, and digital signatures in an interface that feels like part of you.
marketing3D.capitalFlowDesc: Precise cash flow control. Multi-engine AI scanning for expense management, anomaly alerts, and automated document parsing.
marketing3D.revenueEngineDesc: BSD-YBM's client engine identifies needs before they become requests. Deep understanding of customer sentiment to prevent churn.
marketing3D.predictiveCommerceDesc: An intelligent agent that identifies vendor price hikes and performs autonomous negotiations to protect your margins. The system that fights for you.
marketing3D.intelDesc: Our system is not just a database — it's an action engine. While you focus on growth, our AI scans, compares, and protects every cent of your expenses.
marketing3D.ctaFinalDesc: The BSD-YBM BSD-YBM system is the avenue connecting every part of your business. Join the era of autonomous management that works for you.

publicShell.footerLead: BSD-YBM is an intelligent operations system for businesses that want one clear picture of their work.
publicShell.authHeroTitle: One workspace, faster decisions, less manual load.
publicShell.authHeroLead: BSD-YBM connects operations, clients, documents, billing and AI so your team shares one business picture.
publicShell.authHighlight1: One system for clients, documents, billing and control
publicShell.authPanelTitle: Same product — a clear sign-in experience
publicShell.authPanelBody: Secure sign-in, full localized UI and the same visual language as the rest of the site—so you start fast without confusion.
publicShell.authFooterLead: Work from one state of truth—without splitting across tools.

pricing.headline: Plans Adapted to Your Avenue
pricing.subheadline: Choose the precise subscription for your business needs
